case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. NICANOR MAESTRE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHAEL KAHN RE: CCP 1033(B)(2) - FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAESTRE, NICANOR $3,803.60 PRINCIPAL, $392.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,196.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MAESTRE, NICANOR DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2010
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED JAN-12-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAESTRE, NICANOR
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MAESTRE, NICANOR
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $392.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MAESTRE, NICANOR
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL KAHN RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTYS'. FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION OF PATRICIA WEINSTOCK RE: CCP 585 - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
